title: Onboard Waqar as Co-Owner with Full System Access
description:
## Context
Grant Waqar full system access as co-owner of DataTools Pro.

## Steps
1. GitHub organization invite
2. Production environment reviewer access
3. Cloudways team member access
4. Jira access
5. Secret vault invite

## Blockers
Blocked on secret manager decision.

## Acceptance Criteria (from ticket)
- Waqar can open PRs and get CODEOWNERS review requests
- Can approve production deployments
- Has vault access and can run the app locally
acceptance_criteria: Can open PRs and receive CODEOWNERS review requests
implementation_notes: Access-only onboarding task. Blocked on secret manager decision for vault invite.
